Index

All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

I

id - Variable in class simulation.Customer
Customer class has a static counter-value that is used to give each Customer-instance a unique id number.
instance - Static variable in class simulation.Clock
Creates a new Clock-instance
isAvailable() - Method in class simulation.ServicePoint
Checks if the service point has any available employees.
isEmpty() - Method in class simulation.EventList
Checks if the EventList is empty.
isKäyNarikassa() - Method in class simulation.Customer
Checks a Customer-instance's tavaraMaara-value and returns true if the tavaraMaara-value is greater than 2 and false if the tavaraMaara-value is 2 or less.
isLippu() - Method in class simulation.Customer
Checks if a Customer-instance's lippu-value is true or false.
isOstaako() - Method in class simulation.Customer
Checks if a Customer-instance's ostaako-value is true or false.
isVIP() - Method in class simulation.Customer
Checks a Customer-instance's lippu-value and returns true if the lippu-value is true and false if the lippu-value is false.
